description: Declarative contract proving simulator output bundles are ingestion-ready for AI Shift Commander without integrating with ASC runtime. tests/test_compatibility.py enforces every rule below against real exported bundles.

bundle_contract.hashes_rule: hashes.json maps every other bundle file to the sha256 of its exact utf-8 content

conditional.station.recovered: required iff an overload started and recovered before close

ordering_rules.sequence: strictly monotonic increasing across the full stream
ordering_rules.occurred_at: non-regressive (equal timestamps allowed within the same simulated second)

item_lifecycle_rules.completed_requires_prior_taken: per order_id, cumulative item.completed count never exceeds cumulative item.taken count at any point in the stream
item_lifecycle_rules.ticket_completion_gate: a ticket.updated status=completed event requires completed item count == taken item count for that order at that moment
item_lifecycle_rules.abandonment_exception: abandoned tickets may close with taken > completed; that is the modeled guest walking away

ledger_rules.inventory_equation: opening + prep_confirmed_or_received - consumed_item_taken - waste_recorded + approved_adjustments = closing (tolerance 0.01 per component)
ledger_rules.inventory_reconciles_flag: every component row must carry reconciles:true and the equation must verify independently
ledger_rules.staffing_aggregate_only: entries describe roles, synthetic worker refs, and coverage counts; never individual performance

provenance_rules.event_stream_must_match: every event line carries the same simulation_id, scenario_id, seed, schema_version, generator_version as the bundle provenance blocks

safety_rules.synthetic_declaration: synthetic_data:true must appear in every provenance block and every event envelope

bundle_discovery.behavior_when_none_found: tests skip with an instruction to export a bundle (F5 in-game or ExportPanel) and point RS_COMPAT_BUNDLES at it
